info.title: Reporting operator Iopole API
info.description:
## Iopole API

To use the Iopole APIs, you must have a **`clientId`** and a **`clientSecret`**.

You can obtain these credentials by one of the following methods:
- 📧 Contact the Iopole team at **support@iopole.com**
- 🧪 Connect to **[Iopole Labs](https://labs.iopole.io)** to create your own sandbox environment

### 📚 API Documentation
- 🧪 **Preproduction**: [https://docs.ppd.iopole.fr/](https://docs.ppd.iopole.fr/)
- 🚀 **Production**: [https://docs.iopole.com/](https://docs.iopole.com/)

### 🛠️ Support & Monitoring (production only)
- 📈 **System status**: [https://uptime.iopole.com](https://uptime.iopole.com)
  - View real-time platform availability
  - Subscribe to incident notifications
  - Receive alerts for planned maintenance periods
- 📝 **Release notes**: [https://release.iopole.com](https://release.iopole.com)

date.description: Date on which the transactions were recorded.

category.description: {"label":"category","type":"enum","text":"Category","array":[{"label":"Supply of goods subject to value-added tax.","code":"TLB1"},{"label":"Services subject to value-added tax.","code":"TPS1"},{"label":"Supply of goods and provision of services not subject to value-added tax in France, including intra-Community distance sales mentioned in 1° of I of Article 258 A and in Article 259 B of the French General Tax Code.","code":"TNT1"},{"label":"Transactions subject to the regimes provided for in e) of 1 of Article 266 and in Articles 268 and 297 A of the French General Tax Code (VAT margin scheme).","code":"TMA1"}]}

totalTaxAmount.description: Total VAT amount of the invoice.

taxPercent.description: VAT rate, expressed as a percentage, applicable to the corresponding type of VAT.

taxableAmount.description: Sum of all taxable amounts subject to a specific VAT type code and rate (if the VAT type rate is applicable).

taxTotal.description: Total VAT amount for a given VAT type.

value.message: Invalid enum value. Expected {list enum}, received 'TEST'

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication is required and has failed or has not yet been provided.

403.description: Forbidden - The server understood the request, but it refuses to authorize it.

id.description: {"valueDescription":"20 char","more":"BT-1 - Sequential number required by Article 226(2) of Directive 2006/112/EC [2], to uniquely identify the invoice. It can be based on one or more series, which may include alphanumeric characters.","text":"Invoice number"}

issueDate.description: {"valueDescription":"YYYY-MM-DD","more":"BT-2 - Date on which the invoice was issued.","text":"Date of invoice"}

type.description: {"valueDescription":"3 digits max","more":"BT-3 - Commercial invoices corresponds to code 380 and credit note to 381","link":{"placeholder":"UNTDID 1001 list","link":"https://service.unece.org/trade/untdid/d99a/uncl/uncl1001.htm"},"text":"Code specifying the functional type of the invoice."}

taxDueDateTypeCode.description: {"valueDescription":"3 digits max","link":{"placeholder":"UNTDID 2005 list","link":"https://service.unece.org/trade/untdid/d96a/uncl/uncl2005.htm"},"text":"Code giving specific meaning to a date, time or period."}

code.description: {"text":"Invoice note subject code","valueDescription":"3 char","more":"BT-21 - Text of the note subject following. Only in UBL: between ## at the beginning of the line note","link":{"placeholder":"UNTDID 4451 list","link":"https://service.unece.org/trade/untdid/d96b/uncl/uncl4451.htm"}}

content.description: {"text":"Invoice note","valueDescription":"1024 char","more":"BT-22 - Comment providing unstructured information regarding the entire invoice. (Example: Reason for an adjustment.)"}

notes.description: {"text":"Invoice note","more":"BG-1 - Group of business terms providing relevant text notes in the invoice, associated with an indicator specifying the subject of the note."}

id.description: {"text":"Reference to a previous invoice","valueDescription":"20 char","more":"BT-25 - Identification of an invoice previously sent by the Seller"}

issueDate.description: {"text":"Issue date of the previous invoice","valueDescription":"YYYY-MM-DD","more":"BT-26 - Date on which the previous invoice was issued."}

referencedDocuments.description: {"text":"Reference to a previous invoice","more":"BG-3 - Group of business terms providing information about a previous invoice that needs to be corrected or to be subject to a credit note. (To be used in the following cases: - Correction of a previous invoice - Final invoice referencing previous partial invoices - Final invoice referencing previous pre-payment invoices)"}

scheme.description: {"text":"The EAS code (Endpoint Address Scheme) identifies the type of identifier used for parties in electronic invoicing","link":{"placeholder":"EAS code list","link":"https://ec.europa.eu/digital-building-blocks/sites/display/DIGITAL/Registry+of+supporting+artefacts+to+implement+EN16931"},"more":"Once on the European Commission's webpage, download the latest version of the XLSX file containing the EAS codes. Example : For French company it can be : 0002 (SIREN)"}

value.description: The value of the electronic address.

scheme.description: {"text":"The EAS code (Endpoint Address Scheme) identifies the type of identifier used for parties in electronic invoicing","link":{"placeholder":"EAS code list","link":"https://ec.europa.eu/digital-building-blocks/sites/display/DIGITAL/Registry+of+supporting+artefacts+to+implement+EN16931"},"more":"Once on the European Commission's webpage, download the latest version of the XLSX file containing the EAS codes. Example : For French company it can be : 0002 (SIREN)"}

value.description: The value of the electronic address.
